## Summary

- _summary here_

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] `cargo build -p memory-cli`
- [ ] docs/examples updated for user-facing changes

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, or personal absolute paths included
- [ ] Local-first defaults preserved
- [ ] Risky writes remain approval-gated
- [ ] Beta/experimental claims are labeled honestly
